production.playableLoop: Keep the Douglas SBD-3 in controlled powered flight over the Pacific for 45 seconds.
production.objective: Sustain controlled flight for 45 seconds without stalling or ditching.
production.progression: FlightState.progress advances from 0 to 1 while the aircraft remains airborne.
production.failRetry: Altitude loss triggers DITCHED; KeyR or the React HUD retry control restores the cruise pose and velocity.
feedbackMoments: live airspeed, altitude, throttle, flap, objective, and phase telemetry
flap deployment changes both animation and aerodynamic lift/drag
retry visibly restores the aircraft to patrol altitude

assetPlan.playerHero: Example-local, user-provided Douglas SBD-3 GLB regenerated from a bounded Blender recipe with ten powered flight clips.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: No enemy or obstacle is included in this intentionally narrowed free-flight slice.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: The sustained-flight timer is the current objective surface.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Large authored reflective ocean surface, photographic Poly Haven sky and reflection environment, directional sun, ambient fill, and gusting Pacific wind volume.
assetPlan.uiHud: React webview flight deck with event-driven telemetry and portable overlay actions.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: No audio is required for the current free-flight acceptance target.

highValueSurfaces.summary: Textured SBD-3 model with powered cruise, pitch, rudder, flap deploy, flap hold, and flap retract clips.
Reflective ocean, photographic Poly Haven sky/environment lighting, collision plane, and seeded gusting wind.
Responsive 1940s naval-instrument React webview driven by typed overlay events.

uiStates.expectation: Live patrol instruments, controls, and objective progress.
DITCHED warning with clickable and keyboard retry paths.
PATROL COMPLETE appears after 45 controlled seconds.

assetSourcing: The user supplied the hero aircraft; its normalized source, bounded recipe, output, and generator provenance are example-local.
The photographic sky and reflection environment use Poly Haven's CC0 Kloofendal 48d Partly Cloudy (Pure Sky) record.
